updates.name: Perplexity Computer
updates.description: A 'super agent' that coordinates 19 AI models to autonomously execute complex workflows — from building websites to generating datasets. It decomposes high-level objectives into subtasks and delegates to the best model for each one.

updates.name: Notion Custom Agents
updates.description: Fully autonomous AI agents inside Notion that automate recurring work — task triaging, daily standups, internal Q&A, and inbox zero. Set a trigger or schedule and they run 24/7, integrating with Slack, Figma, and more.

updates.name: Manus 1.6 Max
updates.description: Meta-owned autonomous AI agent with new Max mode for maximum performance, mobile app development capabilities, and a Design View for interactive image creation. Now available in Telegram with WhatsApp and Slack support coming soon.

updates.name: Anything API by Notte
updates.description: Describe any browser workflow and Notte's agent builds it, deploys it, and hands you a callable API endpoint. Turns websites without public APIs into production-ready, serverless endpoints you can schedule or call programmatically.

updates.name: Seedance 2.0
updates.description: ByteDance's multimodal AI video generator that creates 2K resolution videos with native audio and lip-synced dialogue. Uses a dual-branch diffusion transformer to generate audio and video simultaneously from text, image, or audio inputs.

updates.name: NOVA by Bridgeye
updates.description: AI coding tool that kills the run-fail-fix-repeat loop. Describe your goal and NOVA writes files, auto-heals errors by running and fixing code automatically, and includes a Janitor mode for on-demand refactoring.

updates.name: Wispr Flow for Android
updates.description: AI-powered voice dictation that works system-wide on Android with a floating bubble UI. Supports 100+ languages, 30% faster dictation than previous versions, and includes a new Hinglish model for Hindi-English mixed speech.

updates.name: Higgsfield AI
updates.description: A multi-model creative workspace aggregating Sora 2, Kling 3.0, Veo 3.1, and 5+ other AI video models in one studio. Features Cinema Studio for timeline editing with simulated real optics, 4K upscaling, and sketch-to-video pipelines.

updates.name: Google Pixel Drop (March 2026)
updates.description: Major AI feature update for Pixel: Circle to Search gains multi-object recognition, Gemini can now order groceries and find restaurants, Now Playing becomes a standalone app, and AI-generated icon styles customize your whole display.

updates.name: Manus Wide Research
updates.description: New research mode from the Manus team that performs deep, multi-source research on complex topics autonomously. Designed for analysts, strategists, and anyone who needs comprehensive research compiled quickly.
